steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states that healthy genetic diversity supports honey bee population robustness, then says a study revealing a ______ of diversity "raised concern." The blank must be a word meaning shortage or scarcity — a finding that diversity was insufficient would logically cause concern given how important diversity is.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'paucity': Paucity means a scarcity or lack of something. A paucity of diversity means there is too little diversity — this directly explains why the study raised concern about bee population health. ✓
  • Choice B — 'redundancy': Redundancy means unnecessary excess or repetition. An excess of diversity would not raise concern given the passage's framing — this is the wrong direction. ✗
  • Choice C — 'disparity': Disparity means an inequality or difference between things. This doesn't convey a shortage — bees could have high diversity with disparities between groups, which wouldn't necessarily be alarming. ✗
  • Choice D — 'repository': Repository means a storage place or collection. "A repository of diversity" would mean a rich store of it, which would be positive, not cause for concern. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
